description: This file defines API endpoints for managing resident profiles, including search, create, retrieve, update, and delete operations. It employs FastAPI, SQLAlchemy, and custom services for business logic, access control, and auditing.

methods.name: DirectorySearchResponse directory_search( q: str | None = None, unit: str | None = None, limit: int = 20, offset: int = 0, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles GET requests to search and filter the resident directory with privacy enforcement.

methods.name: ResidentProfileResponse create_resident( req: Request, payload: ResidentProfileCreate, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles POST requests to create a new resident profile; accessible only by admin users.

methods.name: ResidentProfileResponse get_resident( resident_id: uuid.UUID, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles GET requests to retrieve a specific resident profile by ID with privacy considerations.

methods.name: ResidentProfileResponse update_resident( req: Request, resident_id: uuid.UUID, payload: ResidentProfileUpdate, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles PATCH requests to update resident profiles; allows residents to update their own or admins to update any.

methods.name: None delete_resident( req: Request, resident_id: uuid.UUID, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
methods.description: Handles DELETE requests to remove a resident profile, restricted to admin users.

ctags.name: create_resident
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, payload: ResidentProfileCreate, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: delete_resident
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, resident_id: uuid.UUID, admin: AppUser = Depends(require_admin), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: directory_search
ctags.signature: ( q: str | None = None, unit: str | None = None, limit: int = 20, offset: int = 0, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: get_resident
ctags.signature: ( resident_id: uuid.UUID, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )

ctags.name: update_resident
ctags.signature: ( req: Request, resident_id: uuid.UUID, payload: ResidentProfileUpdate, viewer: AppUser = Depends(get_current_user), db: AsyncSession = Depends(get_db_session), )
